_README: BMDW brand assets for the customer-facing PDF and email. Quote numbers are sequential starting from quote_number_offset.
quote_terms: Final invoice amount paid upon completion. Deposit of 50% required before equipment is mobilized.

_business_rules.tax: 12% flat (GST + PST), applied at the end of the quote.
_business_rules.rental_insurance: 16% surcharge on equipment subtotal per quote. Equipment items don't carry it individually.
_business_rules.deposit: 50% of customer total required before equipment mobilization. Phase plans for jobs > $50K.
_business_rules.trucking_default: BMDW in-house tandem ($100/hr) is the default trucker. Only sub out when explicitly stated.
